1553	// TestResolveRouteAutoResolvesToTierDefaultBeforeGate proves that when a
1554	// request specifies Reasoning=auto, the routing engine resolves it to the
1555	// catalog's surface_policy reasoning_default for the requested profile/surface
1556	// BEFORE invoking the capability gate. Without this resolution an off-only
1557	// candidate could win under a profile whose surface default is "high",
1558	// silently dropping reasoning the operator implicitly asked for.
1559	func TestResolveRouteAutoResolvesToTierDefaultBeforeGate(t *testing.T) {
1560		// off-only harness: SupportedReasoning is empty so the gate accepts
1561		// "off" (which imposes no requirement) but rejects any named level.
1562		offOnly := func() routing.HarnessEntry {
1563			return routing.HarnessEntry{
1564				Name:                "off-only",
1565				Surface:             "test-surface",
1566				CostClass:           "medium",
1567				AutoRoutingEligible: true,
1568				Available:           true,
1569				QuotaOK:             true,
1570				SubscriptionOK:      true,
1571				ExactPinSupport:     true,
1572				DefaultModel:        "off-model",
1573				SupportsTools:       true,
1574			}
1575		}
1576	
1577		resolver := func(profile, surface string) (string, bool) {
1578			switch profile {
1579			case "cheap":
1580				return "off", true
1581			case "smart":
1582				return "high", true
1583			}
1584			return "", false
1585		}
1586	
1587		t.Run("cheap_resolves_to_off_gate_passes", func(t *testing.T) {
1588			dec, err := routing.Resolve(routing.Request{
1589				Policy:    "cheap",
1590				Reasoning: "auto",
1591			}, routing.Inputs{
1592				Harnesses:         []routing.HarnessEntry{offOnly()},
1593				ReasoningResolver: resolver,
1594			})
1595			if err != nil {
1596				t.Fatalf("Resolve cheap+auto: %v", err)
1597			}
1598			if dec.Harness != "off-only" || dec.Model != "off-model" {
1599				t.Fatalf("decision=%#v, want off-only/off-model (auto must resolve to off and pass)", dec)
1600			}
1601		})
1602	
1603		t.Run("smart_resolves_to_high_gate_rejects", func(t *testing.T) {
1604			dec, err := routing.Resolve(routing.Request{
1605				Policy:    "smart",
1606				Reasoning: "auto",
1607			}, routing.Inputs{
1608				Harnesses:         []routing.HarnessEntry{offOnly()},
1609				ReasoningResolver: resolver,
1610			})
1611			if err == nil {
1612				t.Fatalf("Resolve smart+auto: expected NoViableCandidateError, got decision=%#v", dec)
1613			}
1614			var noViable *routing.NoViableCandidateError
1615			if !errors.As(err, &noViable) {
1616				t.Fatalf("error=%T %v, want *routing.NoViableCandidateError", err, err)
1617			}
1618			if dec == nil || len(dec.Candidates) != 1 {
1619				t.Fatalf("Candidates=%#v, want exactly one off-only candidate", dec)
1620			}
1621			c := dec.Candidates[0]
1622			if c.Harness != "off-only" || c.Eligible {
1623				t.Fatalf("candidate=%#v, want ineligible off-only", c)
1624			}
1625			if c.FilterReason != routing.FilterReasonReasoningUnsupported {
1626				t.Fatalf("FilterReason=%q, want %q (Reason=%q)", c.FilterReason, routing.FilterReasonReasoningUnsupported, c.Reason)
1627			}
1628		})
1629	
1630		t.Run("unset_reasoning_does_not_resolve", func(t *testing.T) {
1631			// Regression guard: the Reasoning=unset path keeps its existing
1632			// "no requirement" behavior — only Reasoning=auto triggers
1633			// surface_policy resolution.
1634			dec, err := routing.Resolve(routing.Request{
1635				Policy: "smart",
1636			}, routing.Inputs{

1638				ReasoningResolver: resolver,
1639			})
1640			if err != nil {

1642			}
1643			if dec.Harness != "off-only" {

1645			}

1	package harnesses

3	import "os/exec"
4	
5	// HarnessConfig defines a known agent harness's invocation metadata.
6	// This is a configuration struct (not an interface) that captures binary,
7	// args, flags, and capability metadata for each builtin harness.
8	type HarnessConfig struct {
9		Name                string              // e.g. "codex", "claude", "gemini"
10		Binary              string              // binary name to exec
11		BaseArgs            []string            // args always included regardless of permission level
12		PermissionArgs      map[string][]string // extra args keyed by permission level: "safe", "supervised", "unrestricted"
13		PromptMode          string              // "arg" (final arg), "stdin" (pipe)
14		DefaultModel        string              // built-in model choice when no config override exists
15		Models              []string            // known valid models for this harness
16		ReasoningLevels     []string            // supported reasoning levels in preference order
17		MaxReasoningTokens  int                 // numeric reasoning budget max; 0 = unsupported/unknown
18		ModelFlag           string              // flag for model override (e.g. "-m", "--model"), empty if unsupported
19		WorkDirFlag         string              // flag for working directory (e.g. "-C", "--cwd"), empty if unsupported
20		ReasoningFlag       string              // adapter flag for reasoning control, empty if unsupported
21		ReasoningFormat     string              // format string for adapter reasoning value, empty = use value directly
22		TokenPattern        string              // regex to extract token count from output, must have one capture group
23		Surface             string              // catalog surface identifier: "codex", "claude", "embedded-openai", "embedded-anthropic"
24		CostClass           string              // local, cheap, medium, expensive
25		IsLocal             bool                // true for embedded/local harnesses (no cloud cost)
26		ExactPinSupport     bool                // true if harness can accept an exact concrete model pin
27		QuotaCommand        string              // CLI args for non-interactive quota introspection; empty = skip probe
28		TUIQuotaCommand     string              // Slash command to send as a prompt when native quota signal is unavailable
29		IsHTTPProvider      bool                // true for API-only providers (openrouter, lmstudio) that have no CLI binary
30		IsSubscription      bool                // true for fixed-subscription harnesses (codex, claude)
31		AutoRoutingEligible bool                // true when this harness has full coverage and may be selected by unattended profile routing
32		TestOnly            bool                // true for sentinel/test harnesses that must never be selected by production tier routing
33	}
34	
35	// LookPathFunc abstracts binary discovery for testability.
36	type LookPathFunc func(file string) (string, error)
37	
38	// DefaultLookPath is the production implementation.
39	var DefaultLookPath LookPathFunc = exec.LookPath
40	
41	// HarnessStatus reports availability of a harness.
42	type HarnessStatus struct {
43		Name      string `json:"name"`
44		Available bool   `json:"available"`
45		Binary    string `json:"binary"`
46		Path      string `json:"path,omitempty"` // resolved binary path
47		Error     string `json:"error,omitempty"`
48	}
49	
50	// HarnessState captures the runtime routing-relevant state of a harness.
51	type HarnessState struct {
52		Installed           bool                        `json:"installed"`
53		Reachable           bool                        `json:"reachable"`
54		Authenticated       bool                        `json:"authenticated"`
55		QuotaOK             bool                        `json:"quota_ok"`
56		QuotaState          string                      `json:"quota_state,omitempty"` // ok, blocked, unknown
57		Degraded            bool                        `json:"degraded"`
58		PolicyOK            bool                        `json:"policy_ok"`
59		LastCheckedUnix     int64                       `json:"last_checked_unix,omitempty"`
60		Error               string                      `json:"error,omitempty"`
61		Quota               *QuotaInfo                  `json:"quota,omitempty"`
62		ClaudeQuotaDecision *ClaudeQuotaRoutingDecision `json:"claude_quota_decision,omitempty"`
63	}
64	
65	// QuotaInfo holds parsed quota data from CLI introspection.
66	type QuotaInfo struct {
67		PercentUsed int    `json:"percent_used"`
68		LimitWindow string `json:"limit_window,omitempty"` // e.g. "5h", "7 day"
69		ResetDate   string `json:"reset_date,omitempty"`   // e.g. "April 12"
70	}
71	
72	// ClaudeQuotaRoutingDecision is the result of evaluating the durable Claude
73	// quota cache for foreground routing decisions.
74	type ClaudeQuotaRoutingDecision struct {
75		Fresh        bool   `json:"fresh"`
76		PreferClaude bool   `json:"prefer_claude"`
77		Reason       string `json:"reason,omitempty"`
78	}

899			primaryQuotaRefresh.mu.Unlock()
